User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the Nile Key application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user entity.

companyType.description: The type of the user's company.

whatsapp.description: User's WhatsApp number, including country code.

Supplier.title: Supplier
Supplier.description: Represents a supplier, farm, or packing station.

farmName.description: The name of the farm or supplier.

codificationCode.description: Official codification from the agricultural quarantine authority.

cropVarieties.description: List of crop varieties supplied by the supplier (e.g., Navel Orange, Spunta Potatoes).

capacity.description: Estimated annual production capacity in tons.

contactNumber.description: Contact phone number for the supplier.

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the supplier was added.

Customer.title: Customer
Customer.description: Represents an international customer, typically a trader or importer.

clientName.description: The name of the trader or customer company.

country.description: The target country for the customer, e.g., Jordan.

creditLimit.description: The credit limit for the customer.

hsCodesPreferred.description: Preferred HS Codes for the crops the client requests.

incoTerms.description: Approved delivery terms (e.g., FOB, CIF, CFR).

paymentTerms.description: Payment terms (e.g., Letter of Credit, Documentary Collection).

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the customer was added.

Shipment.title: Shipment
Shipment.description: A single shipment record, representing the core logistic operation.

shipmentType.description: The type or name of the product being shipped.

weight.description: The weight of the shipment in kilograms.

quantity.description: The quantity of items in the shipment.

price.description: The total price or value of the shipment.

customer.description: The name of the customer receiving the shipment.

status.description: The current status of the shipment.

trackingNumber.description: The tracking number for the shipment (e.g., bill of lading).

acidNumber.description: The Advance Cargo Information (ACI) number from the Nafeza system.

carrierDetails.description: Details of the shipping line or freight forwarder.

isTemperatureControlled.description: Indicates if the shipment is in a temperature-controlled container (Reefer).

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the shipment was created.

definition.description: Stores user profiles.  `userId` is the Firebase Auth UID.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the owner user.

definition.description: Stores supplier records for a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the owner user.

definition.description: Stores customer records for a user.

params.name: userId
params.description: The Firebase Auth UID of the owner user.
